description: Authors compared different NB cell lines and identified two sub-states MES (mesenchymal) and ADRN (adrenergic) with characteristic, significantly differentially expressed marker genes.
citation: van Groningen, T., Koster, J., Valentijn, L. et al. Neuroblastoma is composed of two super-enhancer-associated differentiation states. Nat Genet 49, 1261–1266 (2017).
